"No, thanks. I was only going to pick and drop you here, I'm meeting with some friends at the mall." She grabs her phone. "Besides, I don't want to interrupt your kissing session." She giggles.

Emily blushed and walked forward to the entrance.

"Marie, I need to ask you something." Adam whispers.

"Since I met Emily I've been having these." He doesn't know the word.

"Boners?" She chuckles. "You should talk to dad about it."

"I know, but, does it mean I need to do something or?"

Marie looks concerned. "Not at all, kid. You are just nervous, when I was your age, a lot of guys were having them."

"But it keeps happening, I'm worried I might scare her."

"Then relax, stop thinking about it and act normal." Marie sighs. "Seriously though, she looks like a nice girl, don't screw this up." She rubs his head. "And don't worry, your body probably will calm, in some point." She drives off.

Inside the house, Emily puts the pizza on the table in the living room. "You have a nice house." She comments.

"Thanks." He blushes, reminding himself about what his sister told him. "You can start eating if you want, I'll get the ketchup and mustard." Adam runs to the kitchen.

Emily feels bad, she was realizing that Adam was nervous and her reactions weren't helping him, so she decided to be break the ice.

"Here it is." Adam put the bottles on the table and notices something different in Emily. "What is that?"

Emily pretends to eat normally and looks at herself. "Oh, it's my third nipple." She put a pepperoni on her chest. "You didn't see it before?" She grabs the ketchup. "By the way, you have a cut."

"Where?"

"Here." She shoots a red stream at him.

Adam laughs. "Oh, I see. Emily, you want a yellow skin."

"Sure."

He grabs the mustard and shoot at her, too.

The two kids laughed and played together. Later....

15111222112211222222111.content:
After cleanup, Marie looked at the two kids, "So, what do you guys wanna do now?"

"Watch a movie?" Adam asked, getting a nod from Emily, "Yeah. Watch a movie."

"Alright dweeb." Marie said, leading them to the living room, "What'd you have in mind?"

"Emily?" Adam asked, wanting her to pick a movie she'd like.

"Ummm..." she hummed, looking at the various dvds that were under the tv stand before picking up one, "How's about this one?"

"Disney's Cinderella?" Marie asked, before shrugging, "Good taste, always was my favorite, and it's got some good sex scenes." She popped it in the DVD player and sat down on the recliner, letting the two lovebirds enjoy sitting next to each other as she grabbed a dildo.

Adam was enjoying the movie, well, mostly the part where he was sitting next to Emily, he also really wished he couldn't see and hear his sister only four feet away going to town with that dildo, moaning and groaning though the movie.

151112221122112222221111.content:
Watching the final scene of the movie where Cinderella has sex with the prince on their wedding, Emily looks at the clock, hanging in the wall next to them and stands up. "It's getting late, I need to go." She comments.

"Don't worry about that, I'll give you a ride." Marie grabs the keys of the van and runs to the entrance, but notices how Adam was about to say goodbye. "Come on, dweeb, your girlfriend wants you to take her home, too."

Adam blushes and moves. Quickly getting inside of the vehicle, Emily talks to him.

"Thanks for everything, Adam." She says. "And you too, Marie."

"Don't mention it. Anything for my future sister-in-law." She giggles.

"Stop it, Marie." The boy complains. "Emily." Adam rubs the back of his head. "I wanted to ask you if you..." He blushes. "If you don't have a boyfriend?"

"Well, I do. I have a boyfriend." She admits. Adam was pale, his heart was turning into pieces. "Really?" He asks.

"Yeah." She looks at him. "I had a date with him, we ate pizza together and we watched a movie."

"Oh, I see." He sadly replies, looking at the floor.

"She is talking about you, dweeb." Marie groans. "Seriously, Emily, tell him, because he is close to jump out of the car."

Emily giggles. "I'm sorry, Adam. I thought you would get it." Marie parks the car. "Well, here we are."

"Then, I'll see you tomorrow." Emily kisses him on the cheek.

"Yeah, see you tomorrow." Adam can barely reply.

The siblings see the blonde girl knocking the door of her house and getting inside.

"You sure are lucky, dweeb. You got a nice girl." Marie turns the engine on. However, both hear from the house.....

152.content:

But, something happened during this time period, something that prevented them of creating the most important invention of all time.

"I'm awake." A groan is heard. "Good morning, mom."

"Hey, Julie." Her mom greets her. "Hurry up or you'll be late." Her dad moans a little.

"Mom!" Julie observes her mother giving a blowjob to her dad. "Can you please move?"

You see, in this world, clothes were never invented, creating a complete equality between sexual and social behavior, Julie was a teenage girl who was going through puberty. Seeing people around her neighborhood and even her own parents having sex or masturbating was causing a weird feeling in her body.

She leaves her house. "Hi, Julie." Hannah, a friend of hers was waiting.for her on the sidewalk as they are.....

info.brief_description: What if mankind never had to invent clothing?
info.description:
Imagine if you will that mankind never had to invent clothing. Imagine every man, woman, and even children living their lives 24/7 completely naked. They don't even have to wear shoes, because they can go without shoes, but it is as if they were wearing shoes so that their feet will not feel any pain or suffer any type of harm if they stepped on anything that wouldn't affect them if they were wearing shoes. Yet despite people being naked all the time, people still get turned on by nudity after they've hit puberty. There is no shame, their bodies are unaffected by cold weather and everyone is extremely handsome and sexy and full of lust. Also, everyone is completely amiable; there are no wars, no greed, nor anything else to distract from a happy, sex-filled life.
Edit: In this world, people can masturbate and have sex in public. In fact, they can masturbate and have sex as often as they can without any drawbacks. Teenagers going through puberty can have sex to lose their virginity, but only with other teenagers.
Edit 2: While children are naked do not under any circumstances reference anything sexual about it. Their nudity is strictly casual and nothing more.

Just keep these rules in mind:
No underage sex
No rape/non-con
No incest
No Child Pornography
No ending

Other than that, everything's up in the air!
